creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


send-pr works on a -current system. 
Maybe temporarily or user environment problems. 
Even setting EDITOR environment variable to "" 
doesn't disturb send-pr. 
Setting EDITOR to " " leads to an error message. 
I think this PR can be closed. 

Workaround: upgrade your -current system using 
cvsup and rebuild the world. 

Andreas ///
